channel.title: GitHub Fluent Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Fluent in GitHub

item.title: janeczku/calibre-web
item.description: 📚 Web app for browsing, reading and downloading eBooks stored in a Calibre database

item.title: mozilla/blurts-server
item.description: Mozilla Monitor arms you with tools to keep your personal information safe. Find out what hackers already know about you and learn how to stay a step ahead of them.
